subcodes.title: Farewell words to some friends, spoken on 1913-06-11
subcodes.first_line: I have been in your midst for a few months. Only God knows how much I have grown to love you. Your love beats in my heart like the artery of life.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من چندی در میان شما بودم نهایت محبت را بشماها داشته و دارم همیشه قلبم در محبت شما
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
